Class PlayerEntersIntoDistrictEvent

java.lang.Object
org.bukkit.event.Event
com.palmergames.bukkit.towny.event.player.PlayerEntersIntoDistrictEvent
public class PlayerEntersIntoDistrictEvent extends org.bukkit.event.Event
Thrown when a player crosses into Town border.

      @Deprecated(since="0.102.0.14", forRemoval=true) public org.bukkit.event.player.PlayerMoveEvent getPlayerMoveEvent() throws UnsupportedOperationException

      This event no longer includes the delegate PlayerMoveEvent. Use getFrom() and getTo() instead.

      UnsupportedOperationException - always, do not call.
